summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flowboard and Integrations Hub modules. All backend APIs (14 tests) passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all features working: 6 KPIs, Timeline, AI Suggestions, Alerts, Quick Actions, Housekeeping widget, Channel Mix, E-Reputation. Integrations Hub shows PMS (Mews, Medialog) and Channel Manager (D-Edge) providers correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/flowboard/hotels/{hotel_id}/data - Returns 6 PMS KPIs (occ, adr, revpar, revenue, arrivals, departures)
Backend: GET /api/flowboard/hotels/{hotel_id}/quick-actions - Returns 5 quick actions
Backend: GET /api/flowboard/hotels/{hotel_id}/layout - Returns dashboard layout with widgets
Backend: GET /api/flowboard/hotels/{hotel_id}/sync-status - Returns module sync status
Backend: GET /api/integrations/available - Returns 5 providers (Mews, Medialog, D-Edge, Webhook, REST API)
Backend: GET /api/integrations/available/mews - Returns Mews PMS details
Backend: GET /api/integrations/available/medialog - Returns Medialog PMS details
Backend: GET /api/integrations/available/d-edge - Returns D-Edge Channel Manager details
Backend: GET /api/integrations/hotels/{hotel_id} - Returns hotel's active integrations
Backend: KPI values validation - All values are valid numbers
Backend: Timeline events structure validation
Backend: AI suggestions structure validation
Frontend: Flowboard - 6 KPI cards displayed (Occupation 100%, ADR 100€, RevPAR 100€, CA Jour 100€, Arrivées 1, Départs 0)
Frontend: Flowboard - Timeline du jour with 1 event (Arrivée: farouk azougli)
Frontend: Flowboard - Suggestions IA with 'Augmenter les tarifs' (+12€ potentiel)
Frontend: Flowboard - Alertes section with 'Occupation élevée' alert
Frontend: Flowboard - 5 Quick Actions (Nouvelle réservation, Check-in, Check-out, Housekeeping, Rapports)
Frontend: Flowboard - Housekeeping widget with progression bar
Frontend: Flowboard - Channel Mix widget
Frontend: Flowboard - E-Réputation widget
Frontend: Flowboard - Personnaliser button opens edit mode with Sauvegarder/Annuler
Frontend: Integrations Hub - Actives/Disponibles tabs working
Frontend: Integrations Hub - PMS section with Mews, Medialog (Certifié badges)
Frontend: Integrations Hub - Channel Managers section with D-Edge (Certifié badge)
Frontend: Integrations Hub - Nouvelle intégration button visible
critical_code_review_comments: Flowboard API correctly aggregates data from PMS, Housekeeping, CRM, Channel modules
AI Suggestions dynamically generated based on occupancy rate and channel mix
Integrations Hub properly separates PMS and Channel Manager providers
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
MOCKED: External PMS/Channel Manager connections (Mews, Medialog, D-Edge) are mocked - no real API connections
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data (Hotel Demo, hotel_id: 4f02769a-5f63-4121-bb97-a7061563d934)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flowboard and Integrations Hub fully tested. Flowboard displays consolidated KPIs from all modules with real-time data. AI Suggestions are dynamically generated based on occupancy. Integrations Hub shows available providers (Mews, Medialog, D-Edge) but external connections are MOCKED. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_flowboard_integrations.py

mocked_apis_list: Mews API connection - test_mews_connection() returns mock success
Medialog API connection - test_medialog_connection() returns mock success
D-Edge API connection - test_dedge_connection() returns mock success
sync_mews(), sync_medialog(), sync_dedge() return mock SyncBatchResult

flowboard_features_verified.edit_mode: Personnaliser button enables drag & drop widget customization
